coverage_note: The bundled LDLR population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from LDLR LDL particle binding, receptor-mediated endocytosis, cholesterol uptake, and familial hypercholesterolemia biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000130164: LDLR coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: LDLR findings should be read against LDL particle binding, receptor-mediated endocytosis, cholesterol uptake, and familial hypercholesterolemia biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.
rs688 is curated as a LDLR marker for Familial hypercholesterolemia review context, LDL-C and apoB lipoprotein uptake; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

LDLR loss-of-function model is curated as a LDLR marker for Familial hypercholesterolemia review context, LDL-C and apoB lipoprotein uptake; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
